headline: Hubbell, Rockwell Automation, and First Solar Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the Dow hit a fresh all-time high above 50,700 as yields cooled off. Industrials are the most direct play on physical economic activity.
